creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 230542
Screenshot: Bugzilla content missing from the web view of Bugzilla

Re: duplicate bug 260776, the recent misbehaviours with/affecting Bugzilla are (to me) most remarkable. 


Yesterday, 2021-12-28 19:05:59 UTC bug 253149 comment 36: 

> …  as if things are disappearing from Bugzilla then reappearing 
> (I'm certain that I keyed Control-F5 for the most up-to-date view …

Today: as shown in the attached screenshot, the web view of Bugzilla is lagging _considerably_ behind what's received from the bugzilla-noreply@ e-mail address. This is not a local browser cache issue; Control-F5 in Firefox represented outdated content; and an initial view of the same page in Falkon presented the same outdated content. 

I'm not complaining; just FYI. 

HTH
